title: Engineering the future of Kubernetes for AI at scale
summary: Google Cloud Tech session on optimizing Kubernetes for AI workloads including agents, inference, and batch processing. Focuses on hardware-aware platform architecture, infrastructure elasticity, securing agentic workflows, and intelligent resource optimization.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session examines how to optimize Kubernetes for AI workloads spanning agents, inference, and batch processing. It centers on hardware-aware platform architecture, infrastructure elasticity, securing agentic workflows, and intelligent resource optimization. Concrete topics include local inference, I/O optimization, and hardware reuse, reflecting the operational shifts required to run AI at scale on Kubernetes.
